title: Pulling Text Value of Status Column from Zapier
excerpt: I’m trying to pull the status text value from Monday.com in a Zapier step using “Find Column value in Monday.com” it’s returning a value of “{“index”:5}” (See picture below). Is the only way to use the API?

posts.author: jonathank (Jonathan)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m trying to pull the status text value from Monday.com in a Zapier step using “Find Column value in Monday.com” it’s returning a value of “{“index”:5}” (See picture below). Is the only way to use the API?
